name: write_file
description: Create or overwrite a file. Call this immediately when asked to create, generate, or make a new file — no need to search or read_file first. Write reasonable content right away even if the request is vague. When content is unspecified, generate plausible content from the filename and request — e.g. write_file(path='README.md', content='# Project Name\nA brief description.'). Prefer this over bash with echo/cat/heredoc for file creation. For modifying existing files, use edit_file instead.

content.description: The full file content to write.
